records.ety: [F. rsine, L. resina; cf. Gr. "rhti`nh Cf. Rosin.]

defs: Any of various polymeric substance resembling the natural resins[1], prepared synthetically; -- they are used, especially in particulate form, in research and industry for their property of specifically absorbing or adsorbing substances of particular types; they are especially useful in separation processes such as chromatography; as, an ion-exchange resin.
